features.name: n_orders_in_system
features.description: Total jobs currently in the system (waiting + processing)

features.name: n_express_orders_pct
features.description: Fraction of waiting jobs that are express (type E)

features.name: avg_due_date_tightness
features.description: Average (due_date - now) for waiting jobs

features.name: fraction_already_late
features.description: Fraction of waiting jobs past their due date

features.name: zone_utilization_avg
features.description: Average utilization across all 8 zones

features.name: zone_utilization_std
features.description: Std deviation of zone utilization (imbalance indicator)

features.name: bottleneck_zone
features.description: Utilization of the most-loaded zone

features.name: avg_remaining_proc_time
features.description: Average remaining processing time for waiting jobs

features.name: std_remaining_proc_time
features.description: Std deviation of remaining processing times

features.name: throughput_last_30min
features.description: Jobs completed per minute in the last 30 minutes

features.name: breakdown_flag
features.description: 1 if any station is currently broken, else 0

features.name: n_broken_stations
features.description: Number of stations currently under repair

features.name: lunch_break_flag
features.description: 1 if shift is currently in lunch break (t=300-360), else 0

features.name: surge_multiplier
features.description: Current time-of-day arrival rate multiplier

features.name: batch_pending_flag
features.description: 1 if a truck batch arrival is imminent

features.name: avg_priority_weight
features.description: Average priority weight of waiting jobs

features.name: max_tardiness_so_far
features.description: Maximum job tardiness observed so far

features.name: sla_breach_rate_current
features.description: Fraction of completed jobs that breached SLA

features.name: disruption_intensity
features.description: [NOVEL] Composite disruption score: breakdowns + lunch + surge

features.name: queue_imbalance
features.description: [NOVEL] Coefficient of variation of queue sizes across zones

features.name: job_mix_entropy
features.description: [NOVEL] Shannon entropy of job-type distribution in queue

features.name: time_pressure_ratio
features.description: [NOVEL] Fraction of waiting jobs with Critical Ratio < 1

features.name: pct_type_A
features.description: [NOVEL] Fraction of waiting jobs of type A (standard)

features.name: pct_type_B
features.description: [NOVEL] Fraction of waiting jobs of type B (picking-intensive)

features.name: pct_type_C
features.description: [NOVEL] Fraction of waiting jobs of type C (value-add)

features.name: pct_type_D
features.description: [NOVEL] Fraction of waiting jobs of type D (complex/bulk)

features.name: pct_type_E
features.description: [NOVEL] Fraction of waiting jobs of type E (express)

features.name: count_type_A
features.description: [NOVEL] Absolute count of waiting type-A jobs

features.name: count_type_B
features.description: [NOVEL] Absolute count of waiting type-B jobs

features.name: count_type_C
features.description: [NOVEL] Absolute count of waiting type-C jobs

features.name: count_type_D
features.description: [NOVEL] Absolute count of waiting type-D jobs

features.name: count_type_E
features.description: [NOVEL] Absolute count of waiting type-E jobs
